{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Konzō-ji Temple | native_name = 金蔵寺 (京都市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Konzō-ji Temple | coordinates = {{coord|34.954997|135.641156}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Konzō-ji Temple | native_name = 金蔵寺 (京都市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Konzō-ji Temple | coordinates = {{coord|34.954997|135.641156}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Konzō-ji Temple | native_name = 金蔵寺 (京都市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Konzō-ji Temple | coordinates = {{coord|34.954997|135.641156}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Konzō-ji Temple | native_name = 金蔵寺 (京都市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Konzō-ji Temple | coordinates = {{coord|34.954997|135.641156}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Konzō-ji Temple'''|金蔵寺 (京都市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
